productDisplayName: W Women Small Flower Pattern Blue Kurta
description: Composition Blue kurta made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves, a slit neckline, woven stitch detailing around the slit, floral print and a vented hem Fit Regular Wash care Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach Dry inside out in shade Hot iron This kurta by w is designed to accentuate your femininity. Look stylish in this classic piece and revel in the comfort of the soft fabric. Pair it with leggings and heels for a formal look. You can also wear it with denims and matching ballerina shoes for a casual look. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
